1.content:
So as mom is helping pack Bart's and Lisa's backpack, all of a sudden Maggie walks in needing a pull up change. What happens next is this when Maggie goes missing, because Mom accidentally packed her and her sippy cup, food, pull ups, and coloring books in one of her siblings backpacks if so? When do her siblings find her?

(a) Lisa and Bart found her before they left for school. When they double checked their backpack.
(b) on the bus when they were almost to their school, only because Maggie either pooped her pull up or was crying.
(c) on the bus when they were on the bus for their field trip to Capital City, only because Maggie either pooped her pull up or was crying.
(d) after they get off the bus in Capital City, only because Maggie either pooped her pull up or was crying. They asked their teacher if they could call home to have mom come and take their baby sister home.
(e) after they get off the bus in Capital City, only because Maggie either pooped her pull up or was crying. They asked their teacher if they could call home to tell mom that their baby sister was with them and their were going to take good care of their baby sister.
1.title: Mom is helps get Lisa and Bart ready for the trip

15.content:
Bart and Lisa both wondered what mom packed that made their backpack so heavy. Now you think that would have been a red flag to them , and they would have checked and found Maggie right. Well you're wrong because The bus was already running late so Bart and Lisa had no time to check their backpack one last time. Once at school their teacher used the buddy system and paired Bart with his sister Lisa before leaving the school and on their way to Capital City. 30 minutes later they arrived at Capital City, everything was going smoothly until immediately after Bart and Lisa got off the bus. When all of a sudden they _________?
(a) heard Maggie crying and realized that's probably why their backpacks are heavy is because Maggie is in one and her, sippy cup, food, pull ups, and coloring books are in the other one. So they ask the teacher if they can call their mom and tell her that Maggie is with them and they'll take care of her.
(b) smelled an awful smell coming from either Lisa's or Bart's backpack and realized that's probably why their backpacks are heavy is because Maggie is either in Lisa's or Bart's backpack with a poopy diaper in need of a change and her sippy cup, food, pull ups, and coloring books are in the other backpack. So they ask the teacher if they can call their mom and tell her that Maggie is with them and they'll take care of her.
(c) sees Maggie opening either Bart's or Lisa's backpack and reaching for the other backpack where her sippy cup, food, pull ups, and coloring books are. So they ask the teacher if they can call their mom and tell her that Maggie is with them and they'll take care of her.
(d) hear Maggie sucking her pacifier in either Bart's or Lisa's backpack. So they ask the teacher if they can call their mom and tell her that Maggie is with them and they'll take care of her.
(e) hear someone talking from inside either Bart's or Lisa's backpack and find that someone is Maggie. So they ask the teacher if they can call their mom and tell her that Maggie is with them and they'll take care of her.
15.title: (e)

151.content:
Milhouse we've been over this before about bringing baby dolls with you on field trips. So the teacher checks Milhouse's backpack. Hmm I don't see any baby dolls in your backpack Milhouse.

Well of course you're not going to find them because I gave them all to Bart's baby sister Maggie on her 2nd birthday. That only means one thing then Lisa and Bart can I check your backpacks. When all of a sudden Maggie starts calling out for her mom, then for Lisa and Bart. Well I guess that solves that problem. Um not quite because we have to call our mom and tell her that we'll take care of Maggie. What happens next?

(a) while Bart and Lisa our talking to their mom, Maggie gets out of Bart's backpack and grabs ________ out of Lisa's backpack before running over to Milhouse to ask him who her siblings are talking to and that she needs them to help her.

(b) Maggie screams for either Bart or Lisa to take her to go potty. Maggie is shocked when Milhouse comes over and picks her up to take her to the restroom. Wait Milhouse why are you taking me instead of either Bart or Lisa, because their are busy talking to mom.
Lisa and Bart told me to watch you when every I'm around them and they're too busy to watch you, like right now Maggie because there's no way they can get off the phone and still be able to get you to the restroom in time.

(c) why are you taking me Milhouse when I called out for Bart or Lisa to take me, it's because they're talking to mom about how you ended up on the field trip with them and they only trust me to take care of you when they're busy and can't take care of your needs Maggie.
151.title: (a)

153.content:
Who's backpack does Maggie come out of and what did she grab out of the other backpack?
(a) Bart's and grabs her food and sippy cup from Lisa's backpack.
(b) Lisa's backpack and grabs a clean pull up from Bart's backpack.
(c) Bart's backpack and grabs some coloring books.
153.title: (c)

1531.content:
Bart and Lisa are shocked when the see Maggie climbing out of Bart's backpack and grabs her food and sippy cup from Lisa's backpack. What happens next?
(a) Maggie struggles getting her food open and getting her apple juice opened and poured into her sippy cup.
(b) Maggie gets her food open and gets her apple juice opened but is spilling it as she tries to fill her sippy cup.
(c) Lisa and Bart help Maggie with getting her food open and Apple juice poured into her sippy cup, and it's not because she can't do it they're just being helpful as her big sister and brother.
1531.title: (a)

15311.content:
Um Maggie yes Bart and Lisa are you hungry and thirsty and want us to help you. Yes can you Bart open my food and Lisa can you pour my apple juice into my sippy cup. Sure we can Maggie that's why we're your big brother and sister. Hmm Lisa yes Bart if Maggie food is in your backpack and Maggie was in my backpack do we even have our lunches.

Omg Maggie did you eat my snacks well yes I did Bart. When all of a sudden Maggie starts crying, no no no Maggie don't cry that only confirms that the only thing mom didn't accidentally pack for you Maggie was your own snacks. So you're not mad at me for eating them no not all, I mean I wish you would have left me some.


Well Bart I always do keep theses with me to snack on just in case there's nothing else. Wait is that where you have been hiding your candies and cookies, well yes you want some Bart. Sure Maggie say Maggie what else do you have hidden in there. Well if you really want to know Bart, yes I do Maggie. Well I also have some baby wipes, pull ups, baby powder, baby lotion, and diaper rash cream. What about extra diapers Maggie, o I used to carry them until mom started potty training me.

Omg Maggie and Bart I think I know what happened this morning. Well what did happen this morning Lisa, well mom was busy like usual and you and me were running late for school and mom must have been running late to get Maggie to. When all of a sudden Maggie interrupted Lisa and said you two were running late and so mom in the middle of getting me ready for preschool had to help you to get packed, and so when I came in to get my pull up changed mom accidentally put in your backpack Bart and my things for preschool in Lisa's backpack. What happens next after lunch?
(a) Maggie falls asleep for must of the second half of the field trip.
(b) Maggie interrupts Bart and Lisa to take her to go potty.
(c) Maggie shows off that she might be smarter than Lisa.
15311.title: (a)

1532.content:
Bart and Lisa are shocked when the see Maggie climbing out of Lisa's backpack and grabs a clean pull up from Bart's backpack. What happens next?
(a) Maggie gets back inside Lisa's backpack to change her wet pull up and tossed the wet pull up out of Lisa's backpack.
(b) Maggie takes her wet pull up off in front of Bart, Lisa, their teacher, and classmates, and puts the clean one on after wiping herself.
(c) Lisa and Bart quickly ask the teacher where the restrooms are, and then take Maggie into the closest one to change her pull up and also to have her try to go potty on the toilet.
1532.title: (b)

15322.content:
Lisa and Bart are shocked and embarrassed when Maggie strip her bottoms and wet pull up off in front their teacher and classmates. They immediately ask the teacher where the restrooms are, and then Bart picks Maggie up while Lisa grabs Bart's backpack before running her to the restroom. What happens next?
(a) Maggie pees on Bart as they're running to the men's room.
(b) Maggie pees on the floor in the men's room before Bart gets her on the toilet.
(c) Maggie starts to pee right as Bart is putting her down on the toilet.
15322.title: (b)

153221.content:
When all of a sudden Maggie says. Uh-oh I'm sorry Bart, um sorry for what Maggie. Um Bart if may interrupt your conversation with Maggie, sure Lisa go ahead and interrupt us. I know why Maggie said uh-oh I'm sorry Bart, you do Lisa well then why did Maggie say it. It's because Maggie made a, omg quit dragging this out Lisa. I'm sorry Bart because I'm peeing on your shirt. What happens next?
(a) Bart and Lisa are shocked at how much their baby sister is peeing after taking off her wet pull up.
(b) Bart and Lisa scold Maggie for removing her wet pull up in front of everyone and not telling that she had to pee before they took her to the men's room.
(c) Bart and Lisa simply remind Maggie how mom feels about her taking her clothes and pull up off in public, and why she wears pull ups.
153221.title: (a)

153222.content:
When all of a sudden Maggie says. Uh-oh I'm sorry Bart, um sorry for what Maggie. Um Bart if may interrupt your conversation with Maggie, sure Lisa go ahead and interrupt us. I know why Maggie said uh-oh I'm sorry Bart, you do Lisa well then why did Maggie say it. It's because Maggie made a, omg quit dragging this out Lisa. I'm sorry Bart because I'm peeing on the floor. What happens next?
(a) Bart and Lisa are shocked at how much their baby sister is peeing after taking off her wet pull up.
(b) Bart and Lisa scold Maggie for removing her wet pull up in front of everyone and not telling that she had to pee before they took her to the men's room.
(c) Bart and Lisa simply remind Maggie how mom feels about her taking her clothes and pull up off in public, and why she wears pull ups.
153222.title: (b)

153223.content:
When all of a sudden Maggie says uh-oh I'm sorry Bart, sorry for what Maggie. Bart just look down at your shirt, Maggie I'm not going let trick me into accidentally looking at your vagina. Say Maggie is it just me or is my shirt wet, it's not just you thinking that Bart. Really Maggie how do you know, I know Bart because I started peeing as your were putting me on the toilet and most of it got on your shirt. What happens next?
(a) Bart is shocked at how much his baby sister is peeing after taking off her wet pull up.
(b) Bart scolds Maggie for removing her wet pull up in front of everyone and not telling that she had to pee before they took her to the men's room.
(c) Bart simply reminds Maggie how mom feels about her taking her clothes and pull up off in public, and why she wears pull ups.
153223.title: (c)

1532232.content:
So after Maggie is done going potty. Bart helps her wash her hands. So as they walk out of the men's room Bart immediately finds somewhere that can take Maggie over to and scold her for stripping in front of his classmates and especially Milhouse. When all of a sudden who walks over to Bart and Maggie?

(a) Lisa who is very mad at Maggie and says thanks to you Maggie Milhouse won't stop asking me to strip for him.
(b) Milhouse who is upset that his crush has never flashed her vagina to him, but yet Maggie flashed Milhouse with her vagina knowing. So now Milhouse tells Bart that his crush on Lisa is over, and now has a crush on Maggie.
(c) Milhouse confronts Bart about this not being the first time Maggie has flashed her vagina at him, and that she's not doing it on accident but in fact on purpose because she has a crush on me Bart. So now I'm starting to wonder Bart if I had a crush on the wrong sister. Wait what do you mean you by had a crush on the wrong sister.

What I'm saying Bart is that I should have been trying to ask. When all of a sudden just as Bart tries to coax Milhouse to finish his sentence, Maggie sticks her hand in Milhouse's underwear and puts his hand in her new pull up. Um Bart a little help here, omg you were about to say your crush should have on Maggie instead of lisa. Yes now Bart now help me get my fingers out of her vagina and my hand out of her pull up, and then get her hand off my penis and out of my underwear.
1532232.title: (b)

1533.content:
Bart and Lisa are shocked when the see Maggie climbing out of Bart's backpack and grabs some coloring books from Lisa's backpack. What happens next?
(a) Maggie doesn't see her crayons and asks Lisa if she can use Lisa's crayons.
(b) Maggie has some crayons but asks Lisa if she can use some of Lisa's crayons.
(c) Maggie shows their whole class and teacher her drawing of her family, and they make a sly joke about Bart's sisters being artistically gifted. All of a sudden Maggie starts singing. Wow Lisa and Bart your baby sister must have heard Lisa playing her saxophone and listening to jazz a lot while your mom was pregnant with her and after she was born.
1533.title: (c)

155.content:
Mommy! Bart! Lisa! Can somebody take me to go potty! They quickly call mom before taking care of getting Maggie to the restroom. What happens next after they hear Maggie saying she has to potty?

(a) either Bart or Lisa ask the teacher where the restrooms are, and Maggie sticks her head out of one of her sibling's backpack.
(b) Bart and Lisa ask the teacher where the restrooms are, and Maggie sticks her head out of one of her sibling's backpack.
(c) Bart and Lisa aren't the only ones to hear Maggie saying that she has to go potty. In fact their teacher hears their sister saying that she has to go potty, and tells Bart and Lisa where to closest restroom to take their baby sister to is.
155.title: (e)

1551.content:
So who decided to take Maggie to go potty on the toilet. Was it her brother trying to be her big brother or did he just want to get away from the learning. Was it Lisa feeling that it's only fair to take Maggie to the ladies room or did Lisa do to force her brother into learning.
(a) Bart takes Maggie
(b) Lisa takes Maggie
1551.title: (a)

1552.content:
So as Bart and Lisa are asking the teacher where the restrooms are, Maggie sticks her head out of Bart's backpack and says Lisa, Bart I need to pee on the potty. Ok Maggie we're taking you we just need to find where the restrooms are first. When all of a sudden Maggie climbs out of Bart's backpack and runs past Milhouse.

Who then turns around and chases after her right to the men's room. Woah there Maggie you can't go in there that the men's room. Hey Maggie look ahead there's a family restroom I can take you into. So as Milhouse and Maggie walk into the family restroom, Bart and Lisa start freaking out when they don't see Maggie anywhere. Lisa and Bart calm down Milhouse has her in the family restroom over there. Well at least we know one she's safe and two she's using the toilet instead of her pull up. So Bart and Lisa grab their backpacks and run over to the family restroom and knock on the door. They say Milhouse and Maggie it's Bart and Lisa. So Milhouse lets Bart and Lisa in, while Maggie is just finishing peeing on the toilet. What happens next?

(a) Maggie is now hungry and thirsty.
(b) there's no toilet paper so she asks for a baby wipe.
(c) she starts falling asleep.
1552.title: (b)

1553.content:
So the teacher quickly tells the rest of the class to stay right here, before walking over to Bart and Lisa and saying I didn't know it was bring your baby sister with you day. We didn't bring her on purpose are mom must have accidentally packed her into one of our backpacks. Well anyway the restrooms are of over there, and so Bart and Lisa call Milhouse over to carry their backpacks for them. So once inside the restroom, Bart and Lisa tell Milhouse to take Maggie into the stall. They also hand him a pull up and say just in case Maggie's pull up is wet you can give her a new pull up to put on. So while Milhouse has Maggie on the toilet, Bart and Lisa empty their backpacks out. Omg Lisa what Bart look how much of Maggie's stuff is in our backpacks. Omg Bart that means that Maggie is supposed to be at preschool today. What happens next?

(a) they call mom and say was Maggie supposed to be at preschool today.
(b) they call Maggie's preschool.
(c) they have mom call Maggie's preschool.
1553.title: (c)

info.brief_description: Bart and Lisa get lost on field trip to Capital City. Where's Maggie if not at home?
info.description: Do the Simpson's notice Maggie is missing before or after her siblings leave for school? Do they find Maggie in Springfield or did she become a stowaway in the backpack of one of her siblings and when do they find her? What happens if they find her once they're in Capital City do they call home to have mom come and take Maggie home or just call to let mom know that Maggie is with them and they'll take care of her so mom doesn't have to come all the way to Capital City just to pick Maggie up?
info.pretty_title: Bart, Lisa lost in Capital City
